title: Terminal session type definitions for backend/frontend sharing
purpose: Defines shared TypeScript interfaces for terminal sessions and MCP tool response types used across the application.
module_context: Exports multiple interfaces including TerminalSession, TerminalSessionsState, and various MCP tool result types for session management.

steps.content: Define the structure for a terminal session with unique identifier, display name, tmux session name, creation timestamp, and UI tab order.
Define the structure for terminal sessions state containing an array of sessions and a timestamp of last modification.
Define the structure for the result of creating a new terminal session with session identifier, tmux session name, and WebSocket URL.
Define the structure for the result of listing terminal sessions containing an array of session objects.
Define the structure for the result of killing a terminal session with a success boolean flag.
Define the structure for the result of renaming a terminal session with a success boolean flag.
Define the structure for the result of reordering terminal sessions with a success boolean flag.
